question: what changed in the last 10 commits

notes.fact: StdLogger interface now has named parameters (args, format) — change in 1ed0ade aligns it with FieldLogger style.

FieldLogger now embeds StdLogger and groups methods per log level (Debug/Info/Warn/Warning/Error each followed by f and ln variants); commit 611c346 dropped commented-out IsXEnabled stubs and removed Fatal/Panic level methods from FieldLogger (they remain on StdLogger via embedding).
Behavioral fix in faf2645: `if f.DataKey != "" && len(entry.Data) > 0` — empty Data no longer produces an empty wrapper object.
New file added in fa4818c with build tag `//go:build tinygo`; provides stub checkIfTerminal returning false.
Build tag updated to `(linux || aix || zos) && !tinygo` to exclude tinygo from importing unix syscalls.
Formatter interface godoc rewritten in bdaca74 to use [bracket] godoc-links (e.g. [*Entry], [Logger.Out]) and reference Entry.Message/Time/Level instead of entry.Data["msg"].
NewEntry/Dup godoc rewritten with godoc-links in bdaca74 (no behavioral change).
Logger.Log godoc clarified that PanicLevel/FatalLevel do NOT panic/exit when used with Log — must use Logger.Panic/Logger.Fatal instead.
StandardLogger now has a godoc comment (was undocumented); other top-level functions converted to use [link] form for ErrorKey, WithFields etc.
TextFormatter godoc expanded in a41edc6 to clarify only values are subject to quoting; keys are written verbatim. Recommends JSONFormatter for safe keys.
FieldMap example reformatted to gofmt style with trailing commas.

Three doc-only commits: 2ab3c8f corrects Fields signature (map[string]any), d258d28 fixes caller benchmarks example, a328451 removes long-stale lowercase rename note (-15 lines), 5649d7c rewrites maintenance-mode section.
760822c backfills release notes for 1.9.0–1.9.4 (Hurd/wasip1 support, ioutil removal, Writer DoS fix history, min Go 1.17).

c68f1d5: adds top-level `permissions: contents: read, pull-requests: read`, adds `concurrency` group with cancel-in-progress, collapses on:push/pull_request to short form, drops single-platform matrix on lint job, adds bash default shell on test job, reorders Checkout before Install Go.
BFS caller check: only in-repo consumer of FieldLogger is the test itself, which still compiles after the interface cleanup because StdLogger embedding preserves the same method set.
Pre-existing fallback (build tag `js || nacl || plan9`) using `_ any`; tinygo file mirrors this signature exactly.
